author: Dr15Jones
body:
#### PR description:

If a large number of events were in a LuminosityBlock then using 'RunsAndLumis' processing mode could lead to stack overflow.

#### PR validation:

Code compiles. Framework unit tests pass.

resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/2319
title: Remove excessive recursion from InputSource::nextitemType_
